programme.title: The Golden Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sinbad and the vizier of Marabia followed by evil magician Koura seek the three golden tablets that can gain them access to the ancient temple of the Oracle of All Knowledge

programme.desc: Daktari 320

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Max has met a lovely woman who seems to enjoy his company also -- but shes part of a theft ring that cleaned out the Harts

programme.title: Cagney 408
programme.desc: A weekend spent clearing up lousy precinct paperwork leads Chris and Mary Beth to race to serve a warrant before the statute of limitations expires Meanwhile Det Petrie finds his weekend used up painting his apartment

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: A go-go dancer is discovered murdered and bound with television antenna wire She was a former policewoman and girlfriend of Starskys which sparks him and Hutch to tap several eccentric informants for a lead on the crazed killer

programme.desc: A nurse wants the husband of her patient for herself so she delves into black magic to get rid of her patient However her plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Taking a job with the railroad Eric meets and befriends a former prize fighter who was a childhood idol of his who is on the run from the mob after he refused to throw a fight But a bar-room brawl draws the mobs attention to the man

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A photographer whos anxious to get her career back on track gets some unexpected help on her latest photo shoots from Freddy whos terrorizing her models Meanwhile three FBI agents come to Springwood to investigate a family homicide but Freddy has some surprises in store for them

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A TV shock journalist gives an on-air tour of an eerie haunted house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Thinking that a list of KAOS agents is Maxs little black book Max and his old Army buddy get dates with a couple of KAOS agents

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: An eccentric pop singer kidnaps beautiful blonde groupies and imprisons them in his mansion When Stacks disappears BJ goes undercover as a singer to find and free her

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Three American women show up at Stalag 13 and Hogan wants to know why

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: As Hogan tries to help a German scientist defect bumbling Colonel Crittendon interferes again

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Thinking that a visiting Personnel Officer has come to appraise Binghamton for a possible promotion and transfer McHale and the 73 Crew put on a show of their very best behavior But when they discover that the real reason for the Officers visit is to appraise McHale for a possible transfer they must quickly become the most incompetent PT Crew in the South Pacific

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton needs help from Chief Urulu and his Tribe to modify the Taratupa airstrip Urulu - Angry over a bad deal with Gruber involving Navy property - Flatly refuses But after some lessons on Democracy from McHale and Parker Urulu changes his mind and drives a hard bargain with Binghamton for the services of his Tribe

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Gilligan is bitten by a rare deadly insect The Professor informs him that he has 24 hours left to live

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While The Professor tries to round up enough metal to make an anchor for a raft with an SOS message attached to it Gilligan reels in a World War II underwater mine from the lagoon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is upset to learn that Little Luke wants to grow up to be a scientist rather than continuing farming in the MCcoy tradition

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Both Grampa and his best friend George have their caps set on the new librarian

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Now knowing that Max is a spy Max and his Army buddy go up against the KAOS agent know as the Maestro

programme.title: The Police Connection
programme.desc: When a “mad bomber” THE RIFLEMAN himself Chuck Connors – as the police computer classifies his suspect type – blows up a high school and a hospital Lieutenant Geronimo Minneli Vince Edwards TV’s BEN CASEY is on his trail He may have a witness in a young mute woman who was raped at the hospital just before the explosion but she is too ashamed to identify her attacker In any case Minneli reasons that it is unlikely that the bomber would stop to rape a woman after planting the bomb and that the rapist and the bomber are likely different people; therefore the rapist himself might be the only one who can help the police catch him Since the police do not know the bomber’s modus operandi but they do know the rapists Minneli starts questioning his past victims

programme.desc: Filler

programme.desc: Love Boat 118

programme.desc: WKRP 213

programme.title: WKRP 203
programme.desc: WKRP 203

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: An actress Raquel Welch wants to buy the town for a theme park

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman tries to help Freida quit smoking

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: On her wedding day Cindy Jenner Smalley sees or thinks she sees her dead father Hank a famous country-western singer who vanished shortly after arranging his wifes mercy killing ten years before Dan takes the case

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeway is chosen to star in a new dog food ad campaign but the creator has a secret ingredient and will kill to hide it

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: A melodramatic marriage crisis of one of the townsfolk keeps interfering with Dicks book deadline

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Taelon shuttle is shot down over Antarctica There are Jiridians aboard but two of the passengers escape When Augur discovers Lilis blood on the ship he is convinced that she is not dead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Commander John Koenig the new commander of Moonbase Alpha leads the investigation of a mysterious disease at the station and uncovers evidence of a far greater looming disaster

programme.title: Timerider The Adventure of Lyle Swann
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Lyle Swann Fred Ward is cruising through the Mexican desert when he accidentally stumbles into a time-travel experiment and finds himself transported back to the Old West of the 1870s There he encounters an attractive local woman Belinda Bauer and a gang of criminals led by Porter Reese Peter Coyote Lyles motorized bike is impressive in the past -- until it runs out of gas Now Lyle must rely on his wits to take care of business and return to his own time

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili Vorjak and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons Augur is on the run from volunteers but sends a friend Juliet to help Liam while hes gone

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A string of taxi caps are robbed and and the brains behind the robberies is an 18 year old high school senior His mother and deceased father were both robbery detectives

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Taggert a US industrialist has acquired a jade figure which has great religious significance to Kuala Rokat That nation is a small but strategically located nation which borders China Taggerts acquisition threatens to undo years of sensitive US diplomacy but there is no legal way to force him to give the figure back Phelps devises a plan which among other things calls for causing havoc with Taggerts mainframe computer Rollin impersonating an academic from Kuala Rokat and using a highly trained cat in getting the jade away from Taggert

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble meets with a fraternity brother who is now a professor of sleep research at a university and has seen the one-armed man working there The professor has an elaborate plan to extract proof from the man that he killed Kimbles wife

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Victoria poses as a thief in order to become an inmate and investigate conditions at a womens prison Once in she finds it is a miserable place and that she may never be able to leave

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: The ArgonautsCheyenne meets two prospectors whose partner was killed by Indians The partner is the only one who knows where they found gold Given a description Cheyenne is able to lead them to the gold but one of the mens greed overtakes him

programme.title: Project Metalbeast
programme.desc: In 1974 an unhinged CIA agent injects himself with the werewolf blood he found After a killing spree his body is put in suspended animation then thawed out 20 years later by his crazy boss and a team of unsuspecting doctors

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo

programme.desc: A CIA free-lancer Shô Kosugi takes his children and a baby sitter Doran Clark to Malta where he meets his KGB match Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Hoopland an inventor is annoyed that he is small so he builds a robot and makes a wish however when the wish goes wrong; Captain N Princess Lana and Larry Bird help him by going into Hoop Mountain and face Clockman

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents sabotage a US space shuttle by planting a bomb on board Inspector Gadget foils MADs plans and saves the space shuttle Safety Tip Breakfast is the most important meal of the day

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring
